skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Skill Gem, Divine Blast
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Skill Gem, Divine Blast: Project a beam of holy light from your shield to a targeted location, causing an implosion of holy energy. This energy then lingers for a short duration, before blasting outwards in a larger and more damaging explosion.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Skill Gem, Holy Hammers
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Skill Gem, Holy Hammers: Slam the ground ahead of you, calling down a Holy Hammer from above. On hitting an enemy, another Hammer will cascade forward, repeating if further enemies are hit, up to a cap. A Power Charge can be expended to call down additional Hammers to either side of the initial slam. Requires a Mace or Staff.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Skill Gem, Holy Strike
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Skill Gem, Holy Strike: Infuse your weapon with holy energy and swing. Successfully hitting an enemy will summon forth a Holy Armament, which copies your main hand weapon stats to determine its own. These Holy Armaments are undamageable minions, and will attack the enemies you target with Holy Strike. Requires a Mace, Sceptre or Staff.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Skill Gem, Shield of Light
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Skill Gem, Shield of Light: Retaliate against a blocked hit with a sweep of your Shield, unleashing a wave of light in a cone in front of you. Additional waves also emanate from allies in a radius around the first target struck, towards that target.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Strength Transfigured Skill Gem, Shockwave Totem of Authority
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Strength Transfigured Skill Gem, Shockwave Totem of Authority: Summons a totem that shakes the earth around you, damaging enemies.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Static Strike of Gathering Lightning
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Static Strike of Gathering Lightning: Attack with a melee weapon, gaining a Gathering Lightning buff for a duration if you hit an enemy. While you have Gathering Lightning, attacks with this skill will cause chaining beams of lightning, which chain farther the more Gathering Lightning you have.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Searing Bond of Detonation
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Searing Bond of Detonation: Summons a Totem that casts a beam of fire at you and each other Totem you control, dealing Burning Damage to enemies caught in the beam. Enemies near either end of a beam also suffer Burning Damage. Reaching maximum active Totem count will cause all Totems from this skill to detonate, applying the same Burning Damage for a duration.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Dexterity Transfigured Skill Gem, Charged Dash of Projection
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Dexterity Transfigured Skill Gem, Charged Dash of Projection: Channel to project an illusion which you steer. You gain stages while it moves, until it stops at a maximum total distance. Waves of area damage frequently pulse along its path, based on your attack speed. Stop channelling to release the illusion, dealing a final wave of damage. Requires a Melee Weapon.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Dexterity/Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Flamethrower Trap of Stability
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Dexterity/Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Flamethrower Trap of Stability: Throws a trap that releases a number of flames in different directions around it when triggered. The flames last for a duration repeatedly dealing damage.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Kinetic Fusillade of Detonation
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Kinetic Fusillade of Detonation: Wave your wand to create multiple hovering kinetic projectiles. After a short duration, the projectiles explode, dealing area damage. Using this attack again will reset the duration for all hovering projectiles. Cannot be directly used by traps or mines.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Orb of Storms of Squalls
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Orb of Storms of Squalls: Creates an electrical orb that will strike enemies in its area of effect with beams of lightning when placed, as well as when you use a lightning skill while within its area. These beams of lightning can then split to hit more enemies. When striking enemies, this orb will teleport to a random enemy struck. Casting this skill again will replace the previous orb.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Shock Nova of Procession
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Intelligence Transfigured Skill Gem, Shock Nova of Procession: Casts a ring of Lightning around you, followed by a larger Lightning nova. Each effect hits enemies caught in their area with Lightning Damage. This then repeats, with each repeat offset from the previous in the direction of your target.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Intelligence/Strength Transfigured Skill Gem, Storm Burst of Repulsion
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Intelligence/Strength Transfigured Skill Gem, Storm Burst of Repulsion: Unleash orbs of energy while you channel that repeatedly jump away from the targeted location until their duration expires, dealing damage in a small area after each jump. When you stop channelling, all remaining orbs explode, dealing higher damage in a larger area.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Intelligence/Dexterity Transfigured Skill Gem, Siphoning Trap of Pain
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Intelligence/Dexterity Transfigured Skill Gem, Siphoning Trap of Pain: Throws a trap that applies debuff beams to a number of nearby enemies for a duration. The beams chill enemies and deal cold damage over time.

skill_buffs.skill: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Support Gem, Blessed Call Support
skill_buffs.raw: Added a new Strength/Intelligence Support Gem, Blessed Call Support: Supports Warcry skills, causing them to create Consecrated Ground. Supported Warcries have lowered Area of Effect and Cooldown Recovery Rate. Cannot support triggered Warcries.

skill_nerfs.raw: The Kalguuran Scarab now grants Area contains 2 additional Ore Deposits (previously 1, Ruthless is unaffected).
The Essence Scarab now grants Area contains 3 additional Imprisoned Monsters (previously 2, Ruthless is unaffected).
The Domination Scarab now grants Area contains 3 additional Shrines (previously 2, Ruthless is unaffected).
The Anarchy Scarab now grants Area contains 5 additional Rogue Exiles (previously 4, Ruthless is unaffected).
The Ambush Scarab now grants Area contains 4 additional Strongboxes (previously 3, Ruthless is unaffected).

skill_nerfs.skill: The following Maps have been removed from the Atlas
skill_nerfs.raw: The following Maps have been removed from the Atlas: Arachnid Nest, Colosseum, Waste Pool, Thicket, Academy, Infested Valley, Cells, Desert, Bone Crypt, Toxic Sewer, Precinct, Shore, Spider Forest, Estuary, Channel, Bazaar, Glacier, Villa, Ramparts, Museum, Desert Spring, Temple, Underground River, Plateau, Phantasmagoria.
The Ancient Decay Atlas Passive now has one less small node to reach the notable, and each small node now grants 25% slower Expedition Detonation speed (previously 5%).

skill_nerfs.skill: The No Honour Among Thieves Atlas Passive
skill_nerfs.raw: The No Honour Among Thieves Atlas Passive now has Your Maps that contain Smuggler's Caches have a 15% chance to contain 6 additional Smuggler's Caches (previously 5% chance). Unchanged in Ruthless.

skill_nerfs.skill: The following items have been removed, and existing items will be deleted upon logging in
skill_nerfs.raw: The following items have been removed, and existing items will be deleted upon logging in: Fleshgraft, Growing Wombgift, Augmentation Implant, Exalted Implant, Regal Implant, Unstable Implant, Draining Eshgraft, Jolting Eshgraft, Replicating Eshgraft, Storming Eshgraft, Aegis Tulgraft, Freezing Tulgraft, Squalling Tulgraft, Summoning Tulgraft, Battering Uulgraft, Hardening Uulgraft, Impaling Uulgraft, Spiking Uulgraft, Erupting Xophgraft, Flamecaller Xophgraft, Molten Xophgraft, and Stoking Xophgraft.

skill_nerfs.skill: The following Currency can no longer be obtained
skill_nerfs.raw: The following Currency can no longer be obtained: Deregulation Scroll, Electroshock Scroll, Fragmentation Scroll, Haemocombustion Scroll, Specularity Scroll, and Time-light Scroll.

skill_nerfs.skill: The following Unique Fragments can no longer be obtained
skill_nerfs.raw: The following Unique Fragments can no longer be obtained: First Piece of Arcane, Second Piece of Arcane, Third Piece of Arcane, First Piece of Brutality, Second Piece of Brutality, Third Piece of Brutality, First Piece of Directions, Second Piece of Directions, Third Piece of Directions, First Piece of Focus, Second Piece of Focus, Third Piece of Focus, Fourth Piece of Focus, First Piece of Storms, Second Piece of Storms, Third Piece of Storms, First Piece of Time, and Second Piece of Time.

skill_nerfs.skill: The following Uniques can no longer be obtained
skill_nerfs.raw: The following Uniques can no longer be obtained: The Beachhead, Infused Beachhead, The Enmity Divine, The Flow Untethered, The Fracturing Spinner, The Rippling Thoughts, The Tempest's Binding, and The Unshattered Will.
Detonate Dead of Scavenging now has 70% less Damage with Ailments (previously 60%).
Portal: No longer has its casting interrupted by self-damage.
Static Strike: Now has a base enemy zap range of 2.5 metres (previously 2), a base duration of 4 seconds (previously 3), and Beams now deal 30% less Damage (previously 40%).
